text_block_list.text:
After wrapping up some errands with Fuji Kiseki,
we start heading home.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, can you come with me somewhere after
this?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I knew you'd say yes!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And thank goodness because I've already
reserved seats for us. ♪ Come on!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, you'll see soon enough. Just leave
everything to me.

I have no choice but to follow her as she brings
me to the planetarium.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Shhh, just relax. The show's about to begin.

I rest on the reclining seat, and before I know it,
we're drifting along a sea of stars.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Did you have fun today? I like the concerts we
put on, but it's nice to watch the stars dance once
in a while too, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It was cute how the stars of the Big Dipper
seemed to dance around. It made it look like Ursa
Major itself was dancing! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Spica is so gorgeous and mysterious, and... well, I
think its sparkle is just like the twinkle in your
eyes.
choice_data_list: Thank you. But why did you bring me here?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Because I wanted to give you some time to
relax.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You always work so hard to show me that I burn
just as brightly as any star in the night sky.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: So, as thanks, I wanted to show you stars too.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Every distant twinkling star in the vast velvet
stretch above us represents a fraction of the
gratitude I feel for you every day. ♪
choice_data_list: So that's why you chose a planetarium...
So that's why you chose a planetarium...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. From here onward, let me be your guide
to the rest of your dreams.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I want to be a miracle even to those closest to
me. So tell me... what kind of surprise would you
like next?
choice_data_list: I want to see real stars next time.
Anything we do together is special to me.
Anything we do together is special to me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I want to be a miracle even to those closest to
me. So tell me... what kind of surprise would you
like next?
choice_data_list: I want to see real stars next time.
Anything we do together is special to me.
Anything we do together is special to me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Real stars, eh? So you want to travel into space
with me next, do you?
choice_data_list: We don't have to see them that up close...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Never mind simple race tours—I'd love to
go on a never-ending journey to the far reaches
of the Milky Way with you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure it would be delightful to talk about this
and that while weaving through constellations.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'll go anywhere you wish when the time comes.
It's a promise, my dear Campanella. ♪

Gazing at the stars is certainly calming, but her
sweet words are more soothing than anything in
the world.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Haha... You can be kind of scary sometimes, you
know?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe you were able to pull off such a
smooth line despite never having studied theater.
You're something else.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Then again... you and I are both entertainers, so
perhaps it's good that we can surprise one
another.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Let's keep dancing this never-ending waltz
together, you and I, while sharing our dreams.
...Did you like that one? Hehe. ♪

There many be innumerable stars in the sky, but I
have the feeling the brightest star of all is the one
standing right beside me.
